{{CargoRelic
|name=Mamluk Glazed Pottery Bowl
|class_id=21355
|rank=AAA
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=This is a ceramic artwork from the Mamluk Sultanate period, influenced by Islamic culture, known for its exquisite glaze colors. The bowl not only served as a household item but also reflected the aesthetic tastes and cultural characteristics of the time, featuring intricate animal and plant designs, as well as geometric patterns and calligraphy art. These elements were inherited in later ceramics, having a profound impact on the culture of the Middle East.
|fame=50
|art=42
|fth=41
|civ=72
|tech=38
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70
|ss7=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
